---
title: Fall Recruitment
start_month: 8
end_month: 10
category: HR
responsible: HR Director
priority: medium
tags: [hiring, people]
---

Attract and hire talent for planned headcount additions starting in Q1 of the next year.

## Activities

- Map staffing needs with the leadership team
- Post job listings and activate sourcing channels
- Screen applications and run interview rounds
- Extend offers and complete reference checks

## Outputs

- Filled positions ready to start in Q1
